p.em: One byte at a time — no backtracking

text.tspan: accumulate: METHOD SP PATH SP VERSION

g.text: BLUE = accumulate state (write to http_request_t fields)
RED = PARSE_ERROR terminal — send 400 / 414 / 501 then close fd
Dashed red arrows = error transitions (all non-hot-path)
INVARIANT: parser never backtracks — pos advances monotonically
